title: HousingLotteryApplication
description: A household's application to an affordable-housing lottery on NYC Housing Connect — the net-new WRITE surface for HPD. Housing Connect 2 is a closed transactional portal (ASP.NET SPA) with no public API; today a resident can only apply through the web UI. This schema models the application submitted against a published lottery. Not derived from an Open Data column set (transactional, PII-bearing) — it is the missing agent-native civic workflow.

x-source.note: No public API observed; net-new write object. PII is illustrative and would be governed under HPD/HDC privacy controls.

lotteryId.description: The Housing Connect lottery / project the household is applying to.

logNumber.description: Lottery log number assigned after the drawing (read-only).

householdSize.description: Number of people in the household.

annualHouseholdIncome.description: Total annual household income, used for AMI eligibility.

preferences.description: Lottery preferences the applicant claims (e.g. community-board, mobility/vision/hearing disability, municipal-employee).
